goals: Understand what every active opportunity needs next.
Explain discovery decisions without rebuilding context.
pains: Discovery notes, research, and validation are scattered.
Status views rarely explain why an item passed a gate.
behavior_notes: Uses existing work tools heavily but still maintains separate synthesis documents.

goals: Review discovery throughput across several items.
Spot blocked items before roadmap commitments slip.
pains: Handoffs to delivery are inconsistent across PMs.
behavior_notes: Needs stage-level counts as well as item-level detail.

goals: Standardize artifacts and gates across the PM lifecycle.
Audit how one item moved from intake to launch.
pains: Standards exist but are hard to enforce.
Audits depend on tribal knowledge and screenshots.
behavior_notes: Optimizes for repeatability, governance, and later reporting.
